insights: 'High Value Customers' make up 44.0% of customers but drive 70.8% of revenue — prioritize retention (loyalty perks, early access) for this group.
'At Risk / Inactive Customers' have an average recency of 248 days since last purchase. Recommend win-back email/SMS campaigns with targeted discounts before they churn permanently.
'Electronics' is the top revenue-generating category — ensure sufficient inventory and feature it in homepage promotions and paid campaigns.
Revenue peaked in 2025-10 (37,760,706) likely driven by festive/seasonal demand, while 2024-02 was the slowest (16,519,948). Plan inventory and marketing spend around this seasonality.
Overall return rate is 8.3%. Investigate top-returned categories/products to reduce reverse-logistics costs and improve product-page accuracy.
Price Sensitive Customers respond strongly to discounts — target them with coupon codes and flash sales rather than full-price promotions to improve conversion without eroding margin elsewhere.

Personalize marketing using the 7-feature RFM + behavioral segmentation model: match campaign messaging, channel, and offer type to each segment's actual behavior instead of a one-size-fits-all blast.
